basic_details.job_title: District and Subordinate Court Tiruvallur Law Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 34 Posts
basic_details.short_information: District and Subordinate Court Tiruvallur Law Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 04 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 34 vacancies have been announced through the District and Subordinate Court Tiruvallur Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Age limit details are not specified in the official notification. Please refer to the official notification for more information.

qualification.education_qualification: Advocate with not less than 7 years practice in Tamil Nadu Courts for Public Prosecutor/Additional Public Prosecutor/Government Pleader; not less than 10 years for Special Public Prosecutor
qualification.details: Advocate with not less than 7 years practice in Tamil Nadu Courts for Public Prosecutor, Additional Public Prosecutor, and Government Pleader posts. Advocate with not less than 10 years practice in Tamil Nadu Courts for Special Public Prosecutor posts.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Additional Government Pleader. Land Acquisition Cases (District Level)
Additional Government Pleader Cum Additional Public Prosecutor
Additional Government Pleader Cum Additional Public Prosecutor
Additional Public Prosecutor cum Additional Government Pleader
Additional Government Pleader cum Additional Public Prosecutor

selection_process: The selection process details are not provided in the extracted data. Please refer to the official notification for detailed information.
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Law Officer posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Law Officer posts is 24th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Law Officer posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 34 vacancies announced for various Law Officer positions by the District and Subordinate Court Tiruvallur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it to the official address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum practice required for Public Prosecutor posts?
faq.answer: For Public Prosecutor posts, advocates must have not less than 7 years of practice in Tamil Nadu Courts.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum practice required for Special Public Prosecutor posts?
faq.answer: For Special Public Prosecutor posts, advocates must have not less than 10 years of practice in Tamil Nadu Courts.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these Law Officer positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these Law Officer positions is contractual.

faq.question: Q8. Which district is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the District and Subordinate Court Tiruvallur, located in Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is Rc.No.4584287/2026/M5.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
